title: Chicken Tikka

ingredients.title: For Marinade
items: Chicken (boneless thighs preferred): 800g, cut into 2-inch cubes
Kashmiri red chili powder: 2 tsp (for color & mild heat)
Hot red chili powder: 1 tsp (adjust to taste)
Kasuri methi (dried fenugreek leaves): 1 tsp, lightly crushed

ingredients.title: For Garnish
items: Onion rings, lightly pickled in vinegar & salt

instruction.title: Step 1: First Marinade (Tenderizing)
steps: This step helps tenderize the chicken and allows deeper flavor absorption.

instruction.title: Step 2: Main Marinade
steps: Add chili powders, turmeric, coriander, cumin, garam masala, kasuri methi, mustard oil, and the rest of ginger-garlic paste.
Adjust salt and lemon juice, then coat chicken pieces well.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 6 hours (overnight for best results).

instruction.title: Step 3: Cooking
steps: Skewer marinated chicken, roast in a tandoor until charred at edges and cooked through (8–10 minutes).
Line a tray with foil, place chicken pieces on a rack.
Cook for 12–15 minutes, brushing with melted butter or ghee midway.
Broil (top heat) for the last 2–3 minutes for charred effect.
Rest cooked chicken for 2–3 minutes before serving.
Garnish with lemon wedges, onion rings, and fresh coriander.
Optional: serve with green mint chutney for a complete restaurant-style presentation.

chefTips: Boneless thighs are juicier than breast meat.
Using mustard oil in marinade gives authentic North Indian flavor.
For smoky aroma, do a dhungar (charcoal smoke infusion) before serving
